experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Member of the UI team at Mandiant Security Validation. Resolved 40+ critical bugs and implemented user requirements in a React.js application. Fixed bugs, when necessary, in the backend (Ruby on Rails).

Maintained integrations within a FaaS microservices architecture (Mandiant SecOps Integrations Team) for connectors such as Trellix, Elasticsearch, Google Chronicle, CrowdStrike, Carbon Black, Palo Alto and more. +4 New Integrations, +14 Refactored/Changed, +18 Fixes.
Updated FastAPI from v0.78 to v0.123. Updated Pydantic from v1 to v2 and migrated 100+ models. Updated HTTPX from v0.23 to v0.28 and handled the transport layer migration.
Implemented an SSL Context Manager for CA bundles and improved Proxies support.

experience.title: Test Engineer
bullets: Validated environment integrity for Mandiant Security Validation through Regression and Smoke testing.
Deployed virtual testing environments with Jenkins and VMWare vSphere.
Automated UI testing with TestCafe and API testing with Pytest.

experience.title: Front End Developer
bullets: Developed a management dashboard that centralizes Jira and Linear tickets in a single interface, allowing time and event tracking of multiple projects to improve the accuracy of estimates in future sprints.
